overall.description: A cinematic third-person game scene showing a red-haired woman walking along a dramatic coastal landscape during golden hour. She explores rocky shores with tidal pools and ancient ruins visible in the distance, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with dramatic lighting and detailed environmental textures.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal trail with wooden fencing and tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward distant banner poles, with long red hair and dark coat flowing

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and rails lining the left side of the path
tall wooden poles with hanging fabric banners fluttering in the wind
large layered rock outcrops along the coastline
golden-brown tall grass growing in clumps along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a coastal dirt trail bordered by wooden fences and tall golden grass. The camera follows from behind as she approaches tall banner poles in the distance, with dramatic cloud formations overhead and rocky coastal formations visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with tidal pools and ocean views

events.description: character reaches the shoreline and begins walking along the water's edge with tidal pools

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky beach, observing the ocean and distant ruins while navigating around tidal pools

entered.detail: shallow pools of water reflecting the sky, scattered across the rocky shore
calm sea with gentle waves lapping against the rocks
large stone ruin with arched windows perched on a distant cliff

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto the rocky shoreline, walking between tidal pools and the ocean. The distant ruined castle becomes visible across the water as waves gently lap against the rocks, while the banner poles now appear to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky inland terrain with large boulders and cliffs

events.description: character turns away from the shoreline and begins ascending into rocky inland terrain

agents.ego_description: turning inland away from the water and walking through rocky terrain toward the banner poles and cliffs

entered.detail: large stacked boulders and rocky outcrops surrounding the path
tall sheer cliff faces with layered rock strata

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the ocean and walks into a rocky landscape dominated by large boulders and coastal cliffs. The banner poles now stand to the right as she navigates the uneven gravel terrain, moving deeper into the rugged coastal environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a manicured coastal trail into a rugged, boulder-strewn wilderness. It begins behind the character as she walks along a dirt path bordered by wooden fences and golden grass, moving toward distant banner poles under a dramatic sky. As she leaves the trail, the scene shifts to the rocky shoreline where she navigates between tidal pools and gentle waves, bringing a ruined castle into view across the water. The camera then follows her as she turns away from the ocean, moving from the wet coast into a landscape of large boulders and steep cliffs. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly uneven and gravelly as she pushes deeper into the rugged coastal environment with the banner poles now positioned to her right.
